templates.name: How do I return an item I received as a gift?
templates.content:
If you have the original order information, you can start the process here: https://iheartraves.loopreturns.com/#/gift If you don't have the original order information, please follow the steps below:

- Go to the following link: https://iheartraves.loopreturns.com/#/gift
- Click on the "Don't have your order information?", fill out the form, and we will process your return.
- Then you will receive an email with further instructions.

templates.name: What is the best way to wash my sequin/rhinestone bra?
templates.content: We recommend hand washing your specialty bra in cold water with mild detergent. Be careful not to scrub too hard as this may damage your bra. Line dry only!

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content:
Once an order has been placed we are unable to add or remove items. You can contact our customer support team and request to have your order canceled so you can place a new order with the correct item(s). 

If you need to cancel your order you can call us at 1-844-447-5509 within 1 hour of placing your order and we will try to make every effort to honor your cancellation request! If your order has already been processed, we will no longer be able to grant your cancellation request.

templates.name: Do you ship to APO/FPO addresses?
templates.content: Yes, we ship to PO boxes and APO/FPO addresses. Orders shipped to these addresses will ship via USPS Mail service.

templates.name: My lights are displaying a red hue
templates.content: When your light batteries are low your lights will begin to display a reddish hue. Try changing your batteries for brand new ones, or charging your batteries if your flow toy comes with a rechargeable battery. Remember, the more you use your lights the faster the batteries will drain.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 1-3 business days and we usually ship via USPS, UPS, DHL, and FedEx. Once shipped it will take 5-8 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: You can start your return here: https://iheartraves.loopreturns.com/#/

templates.name: Can I upgrade my shipping speed after my order is placed?
templates.content: Once an order is placed, we are unable to make any changes to that order. This includes upgrading or downgrading shipping options. If you need to cancel your order, you can call us at 1-844-iHR-5509 / 1-844-447-5509 within 1 hour of placing your order so we can try canceling it for you. If your order has already entered the shipping process; unfortunately, we are unable to grant your cancellation request.

templates.name: How do I receive store credit?
templates.content: Store credit gets issued automatically within 1 business day to the email address used when placing your order. Your store credit will be received in the form of an electronic gift card with a unique code. This unique code can be used when checking out in our 'Gift Card or Discount Code' section and it will also never expire!

templates.name: Do you offer price adjustments?
templates.content: I'm afraid we cannot honor sale prices on orders placed before or after the active sale dates. All sales are time-sensitive and strictly subject to this policy. If you have any questions regarding your order, please contact us via this link: https://iheartraves.gorgias.help/en-US/contact

templates.name: My Glove Lights will not turn on
templates.content: Please note that our glove lights come with a feature called 'eLock'. This function is to prevent your lights from turning on during transit and to help preserve battery life when stored away. Please follow the instructions on this link and let me know how that goes: https://iheartraves.gorgias.help/en-US/my-glove-lights-will-not-turn-on-148783

templates.name: 110% price match guarantee
templates.content: We offer a 110% price match guarantee. If you see another major competing online retailer selling a product that we carry for a cheaper price, we'll match the price AND take an additional 10% off. Price matches can only be applied within 24 hours of placing your order. You can read more about it here: https://iheartraves.gorgias.help/en-US/110%25-price-match-guarantee-148735

templates.name: Do you offer international shipping?
templates.content: Yes! We currently ship to most countries that accept USPS, UPS, DHL, and FedEx.

templates.name: Do you offer free returns?
templates.content: If the return was due to an error of ours, we will accept responsibility for all shipping costs related to the return and provide a USPS prepaid shipping label via email. If the return is not due to an error of ours, a $4 return label fee is deducted from the total amount available for store credit.

templates.name: What sizes do you offer?
templates.content: We are proud to offer rave gear in diverse sizes and are committed to expanding our product selection daily. Most products have a Size Guide in the production description as our sizes differ based on brands and garment types. If you don't see your size in a particular garment, don't hesitate to contact support@iheartraves.com to let us know! We appreciate your feedback.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://www.iheartraves.com/collections/rave-clothing-on-sale

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at support@iheartraves.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Can I exchange my order?
templates.content: You can return your order for store credit. If you need to exchange your item(s) for a different size, style or color, please follow the steps on this link: https://iheartraves.gorgias.help/en-US/can-i-exchange-my-order-148773

templates.name: What countries do you not offer shipping to?
templates.content: Please reference the following list for all countries that we currently do not ship to: https://iheartraves.gorgias.help/en-US/what-countries-do-you-not-offer-shipping-to-148754

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://www.iheartraves.com/pages/track-your-order

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at support@iheartraves.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: How do I factory reset my lights to the default settings?
templates.content: While your light is OFF hold down the button until you see a white flashing light. Select High White and your lights will reprogram back to their default programming. If you change your mind, just select Low White to exit and keep your current programming.

templates.name: How long does it take to process a return?
templates.content: Please allow for 3-5 days processing time once your item(s) have arrived back at our warehouse. Once your return has been processed, you will receive a follow-up email containing your store credit information.

templates.name: Can I return a final sale item?
templates.content: I'm afraid all hosiery, undergarments, face masks, and items marked final sale are not eligible for a return.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out!

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at support@iHeartRaves.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Do you ship out orders over the weekend?
templates.content: I'm afraid not. Orders placed before 12 pm PST (M-F) are expected to ship the same day. Otherwise, it will ship within 3 business days. Once shipped, you will receive your order based on the shipping method you selected upon checkout. Orders are processed 5 days a week, excluding weekends and holidays.

templates.name: Sizing (clothes)
templates.content: Happy to help! Would you mind sharing your usual size? I'd also recommend taking a look at our size guide on each product page.

templates.name: How do I wash my clothes?
templates.content: I'd recommend following the instructions on this link: https://iheartraves.gorgias.help/en-US/how-do-i-wash-my-clothes-148809

templates.name: Do you sell any brands other than iHeartRaves?
templates.content: We are proud to offer many of our favorite brands on iheartraves.com! From our sister brands, EmazingLights and INTO THE AM, to industry leaders like MYVL and YRU, we have everything to make you look your best on festival days and beyond!

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $80. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1-844-447-5509 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: How do I clean my fluffies?
templates.content: We've created an easy 7-step process for you to follow. Check it out here: https://iheartraves.gorgias.help/en-US/how-do-i-clean-my-fluffies-148795

templates.name: Do your clothes shrink after I wash them?
templates.content: All of our garments come with specific wash/care instructions to help you prevent damaging your items. Keep in mind, we offer many different types of fabrics on our site and every fabric needs to be treated differently. Please refer to the care label inside your garment for the best results.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/iheartraves and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/iHeartRaves/

templates.name: How long does it take for my refund to process?
templates.content:
If you're not completely satisfied with your purchase, you can return it within 30 days of placing your order. All returns will be issued store credit only, and it does not expire. Returns are processed within 3-5 business days after we receive your return.

Please note that we do not offer refunds and some products are not returnable, such as hosiery, undergarments, face masks, and final sale items.

templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://www.iheartraves.com/collections/rave-clothing-on-sale

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://iheartraves.gorgias.help/en-US/what-are-your-return-guidelines-947746
